chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Bail Application No.S- 1506 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA 10651/2024. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on MA 10652/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 08.12.2025. Mr. Zainuddin Chandio, Advocate for applicant alongwith applicant. = 1. Granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted. 4. Applicant Mst. Ghazala seeks protective bail in Crime No.01 of 2025 registered at Police Station ACE, Dadu in respect of offences u/s 161, 465, 468, 471, 477-A, 420, 34 PPC r/w Section 5 Act-II of 1947. According to learned counsel for applicant, the applicant is innocent and has falsely been implicated in the case in hand with malafide intention and ulterior motive; that applicant is willing to surrender herself before the trial Court but apprehending her imminent arrest at the hands of police, has approached this Court for protective bail. Serious malafide on the part of complainant and police has been alleged. Without touching the merits of the case, applicant is granted protective bail till 12.12.2025 (Friday), commencing from today, subject to her furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand) and P.R. Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court, enabling her to appear before the trial Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of aforesaid period i.e. 12.12.2025 (Friday) or when the applicant surrenders herself before the trial Court, whichever is earlier. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of. JUDGE Tufail
